title: Meat-Infused Korean Ground Beef Bowl
description: Fresh, crunchy Korean dish featuring ground beef, kimchi, and toasted sesame seeds. This Buddhist-temple-friendly recipe is perfect for meal prep.

ingredients.name: Infused oil
ingredients.notes: nut oil infused with garlic and ginger

instructions: In a large pan, heat the sesame oil over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the kimchi and cook, stirring occasionally, until it starts to caramelize, about 3 minutes.
Add the infused oil, soy sauce, sugar, rice vinegar, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the meat mixture to a bowl and top with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
Serve immediately, or refrigerate or freeze for later use.
